units.title: 1. 詞性 (Parts of Speech)
units.summary: 名詞、動詞、形容詞、副詞的判斷 —— 多益 Part 5 最常考

sections.heading: 八大詞性速覽
sections.body: 英文有八大詞性：名詞 (noun)、動詞 (verb)、形容詞 (adjective)、副詞 (adverb)、代名詞 (pronoun)、介系詞 (preposition)、連接詞 (conjunction)、感嘆詞 (interjection)。TOEIC Part 5 會在空格前後給你線索，要你挑對的詞性。
examples: 名詞：manager, decision, development
動詞：develop, decide, manage
形容詞：successful, careful, decisive
副詞：successfully, carefully, quickly

sections.heading: 字尾線索（超級實用）
sections.body:
看字尾可以 90% 判斷詞性：

  • 名詞字尾：-tion, -sion, -ment, -ness, -ity, -ance, -ence, -er/-or, -ist
    例：decision, development, happiness, ability, importance, teacher
  • 形容詞字尾：-ful, -less, -ous, -ive, -able, -ible, -al, -ic
    例：careful, useless, famous, effective, capable, economic
  • 副詞字尾：-ly（大多數，但 friendly 是形容詞！）
    例：carefully, successfully, quickly
  • 動詞字尾：-ize, -ify, -en, -ate
    例：organize, simplify, strengthen, create

sections.heading: 判斷技巧：看空格位置
sections.body:
• 空格在冠詞 a/an/the 之後 → 名詞（可能中間夾形容詞）
  • 空格在 be 動詞之後 → 形容詞（形容主詞）
  • 空格在名詞前 → 形容詞（修飾名詞）
  • 空格在動詞旁修飾它 → 副詞
  • 空格在句子主要位置（主詞或受詞）→ 名詞

quiz.question: The new system has greatly improved the ______ of our team.
quiz.explanation: the ___ of 中間要名詞。productivity 是名詞（生產力）。produce 是動詞，productive 是形容詞，productively 是副詞。

quiz.question: Ms. Chen is a ______ manager who always meets deadlines.
quiz.explanation: 名詞 manager 前面要形容詞。reliable（可靠的）是形容詞。

quiz.question: The team completed the project ______ before the deadline.
quiz.explanation: 修飾動詞 completed 要用副詞。successfully 是副詞。

quiz.question: Our company's rapid ______ surprised everyone in the industry.
quiz.explanation: 所有格 company's + 形容詞 rapid + ___ 要名詞。growth 是名詞。

quiz.question: The report was ______ reviewed by the senior staff.
quiz.explanation: was ___ reviewed 中間修飾動詞 reviewed 要副詞。carefully 是副詞。

units.title: 2. 時態 (Tenses)
units.summary: 12 種時態的使用情境與時間副詞搭配

sections.heading: 時態的兩個維度：時間 + 狀態
sections.body:
英文時態 = 時間（現在/過去/未來）× 狀態（簡單/進行/完成/完成進行）。但多益最常考這 6 種：

  • 現在簡單式：I work
  • 現在進行式：I am working
  • 現在完成式：I have worked
  • 過去簡單式：I worked
  • 過去完成式：I had worked
  • 未來式：I will work

sections.heading: 關鍵時間副詞（看到就知道時態）
sections.body:
• 現在簡單：always, usually, every day, often（習慣）
  • 現在進行：now, at the moment, currently（正在）
  • 現在完成：since, for, already, yet, recently, just（從過去到現在）
  • 過去簡單：yesterday, ago, last week, in 2020
  • 過去完成：by the time, before（過去的過去）
  • 未來：tomorrow, next week, by 2030

sections.heading: since / for 跟著現在完成式
sections.body:
since + 時間點（since 2020, since Monday）
for + 時間長度（for 5 years, for two weeks）
兩者通常跟 現在完成式 一起用。
examples: I have worked here for 3 years.（我在這工作 3 年了）
She has lived in Tokyo since 2018.

quiz.question: Mr. Tanaka ______ for this company since 2015.
quiz.explanation: since + 時間點 → 現在完成式 have/has + p.p.

quiz.question: The delivery ______ tomorrow morning.
quiz.explanation: tomorrow 是未來時間，用 will arrive。

quiz.question: By the time we arrived, the meeting ______ already started.
quiz.explanation: by the time + 過去，表示過去的過去 → 過去完成式 had + p.p.

quiz.question: She ______ the report right now.
quiz.explanation: right now → 現在進行式 be + Ving。

quiz.question: Our CEO ______ the new product last month.
quiz.explanation: last month 是過去時間 → 過去簡單式。

units.title: 3. 被動語態 (Passive Voice)
units.summary: be + p.p. 的用法 —— 商務英文中超常見

sections.heading: 被動語態的形式
sections.body:
主動：S + V + O
被動：O + be + p.p. + (by S)

被動用在「主詞是動作的承受者」或「不重要誰做的」。商務信件非常愛用被動。
examples: The report was written by Mr. Lee.（報告是由李先生寫的）
Your order has been shipped.（您的訂單已寄出）
All employees are required to attend.（所有員工需要參加）

sections.heading: 各時態的被動
sections.body:
• 現在被動：is/are + p.p.
  • 過去被動：was/were + p.p.
  • 現在完成被動：has/have been + p.p.
  • 未來被動：will be + p.p.
  • 情態動詞被動：can/should/must + be + p.p.

quiz.question: The new policy ______ by all staff members.
quiz.explanation: 情態動詞被動：must + be + p.p.

quiz.question: Your package ______ tomorrow morning.
quiz.explanation: 包裹是被送達 → 未來被動 will + be + p.p.

quiz.question: The building ______ last year.
quiz.explanation: last year 過去時間，建築物被翻新 → 過去被動 was + p.p.

quiz.question: All applications ______ carefully before any decision is made.
quiz.explanation: 申請是被審核 → 現在被動 are + p.p.

units.title: 4. 關係子句 (Relative Clauses)
units.summary: who / which / that / whose 的用法

sections.heading: 關係代名詞三劍客：who / which / that
sections.body:
• who：先行詞是人，後面接動詞
  • which：先行詞是物，後面接動詞
  • that：人/物皆可（但非限定用法不可用 that）
  • whose：所有格，「~的」
  • whom：who 的受格，後面接 S+V（越來越少用）
examples: The employee who works hardest will get a bonus.
The laptop which I bought last week is broken.
The customer whose order is delayed is calling.

sections.heading: 判斷技巧
sections.body:
看兩件事：先行詞是人還是物 + 空格後接什麼。
空格後接動詞 → 主格（who/which/that）
空格後接 S+V → 受格（可省略）
空格後接名詞 → whose

quiz.question: The candidate ______ has the most experience will be hired.
quiz.explanation: 先行詞 candidate 是人，後接動詞 has → 主格 who。

quiz.question: The software ______ we purchased is very user-friendly.
quiz.explanation: 先行詞 software 是物，後接 S+V (we purchased) → 受格 which。

quiz.question: Mr. Kim, ______ office is on the third floor, is the new director.
quiz.explanation: 空格後接名詞 office，且意思是「他的辦公室」→ whose。

quiz.question: The report ______ was submitted yesterday contains several errors.
quiz.explanation: 先行詞 report 是物，後接動詞 was → that 或 which，選項只有 that。

units.title: 5. 連接詞 (Conjunctions)
units.summary: 對等、從屬、轉折 —— 分辨詞性最重要

sections.heading: 三大類連接詞
sections.body:
1. 對等連接詞（連接兩個同等地位的東西）：for, and, nor, but, or, yet, so（口訣 FANBOYS）

2. 從屬連接詞（引導從屬子句）：because, since, although, though, while, when, if, unless, after, before, until

3. 介系詞片語（後面只接名詞，不是連接詞！）：because of, due to, despite, in spite of

sections.heading: 最常考：連接詞 vs 介系詞
sections.body:
多益最愛考這個陷阱 —— 後面接句子還是名詞？

  • because + 句子 / because of + 名詞
  • although + 句子 / despite + 名詞
  • while + 句子 / during + 名詞
examples: Because it was raining, we stayed home. ✓
Because of the rain, we stayed home. ✓
Despite the rain, we went out. ✓
Although it was raining, we went out. ✓

quiz.question: ______ the heavy traffic, we arrived on time.
quiz.explanation: the heavy traffic 是名詞片語，要用介系詞 Despite（儘管）。Although 後要接子句。

quiz.question: The meeting was postponed ______ several key members were sick.
quiz.explanation: 後面是句子 several key members were sick，要用連接詞 because。

quiz.question: You should arrive early ______ you want a good seat.
quiz.explanation: 表達條件「如果」→ if。

quiz.question: The presentation was well received, ______ the short preparation time.
quiz.explanation: 後接名詞片語 the short preparation time → 介系詞 despite。

units.title: 6. 動名詞 vs 不定詞 (Gerund vs Infinitive)
units.summary: Ving 還是 to V？背固定搭配

sections.heading: 動詞後只接 Ving
sections.body:
口訣「MEGAFEPS」：mind, enjoy, give up, avoid, finish, escape, practice, suggest
其他常見：consider, deny, postpone, admit, appreciate, recommend, risk, quit
examples: I enjoy reading business news.
He suggested postponing the meeting.
We can't avoid paying taxes.

sections.heading: 動詞後只接 to V
sections.body: 常見：want, hope, wish, plan, decide, expect, promise, refuse, agree, offer, manage, fail, tend, pretend
examples: We plan to launch next month.
She agreed to sign the contract.

sections.heading: 介系詞後一定接 Ving
sections.body: to 是介系詞時也要接 Ving（這個特別容易錯）：be used to / look forward to / object to / in addition to + Ving
examples: I look forward to meeting you.（不是 meet）
She is used to working long hours.

quiz.question: We look forward to ______ from you soon.
quiz.explanation: look forward to 的 to 是介系詞，後面接 Ving。

quiz.question: The manager suggested ______ the deadline.
quiz.explanation: suggest 後面只接 Ving。

quiz.question: They decided ______ the new proposal.
quiz.explanation: decide 後面接 to V。

quiz.question: She is considering ______ for another position.
quiz.explanation: consider 後面接 Ving。

units.title: 7. 假設語氣 (Conditionals)
units.summary: If 子句的三種時態搭配

sections.heading: 三種假設句型
sections.body:
第一類（可能發生的未來）：
If + 現在式, will + 原形
例：If it rains, we will cancel the event.

第二類（與現在事實相反）：
If + 過去式, would + 原形
例：If I were rich, I would buy a house.

第三類（與過去事實相反）：
If + had + p.p., would have + p.p.
例：If I had studied, I would have passed.

sections.heading: 重要提醒
sections.body:
• 第二類的 be 動詞統一用 were（If I were you...）
  • if 子句裡不用 will（If it rains, 不是 If it will rain）

quiz.question: If the weather ______ good tomorrow, we will go hiking.
quiz.explanation: 第一類假設，if 子句用現在式。

quiz.question: If I ______ you, I would accept the offer.
quiz.explanation: 第二類假設，be 動詞用 were。

quiz.question: If we had invested earlier, we ______ more money.
quiz.explanation: 第三類假設（過去事實相反），主句用 would have + p.p.

units.title: 8. 比較級與最高級 (Comparatives & Superlatives)
units.summary: 比較三個層級：原級、比較級、最高級

sections.heading: 三級變化
sections.body:
短單字（1-2 音節）：加 -er / -est
tall → taller → tallest
長單字（3 音節以上）：加 more / most
expensive → more expensive → most expensive

不規則：good → better → best, bad → worse → worst

sections.heading: 比較句型
sections.body:
• 原級：as + 形容詞 + as（跟...一樣）
  • 比較級：比較級 + than（比...更）
  • 最高級：the + 最高級 + in/of...（最...的）
examples: Tom is as tall as Jerry.
This year's sales are higher than last year's.
It is the most expensive item in the store.

quiz.question: Our new office is ______ than the old one.
quiz.explanation: than 前面用比較級，big 的比較級是 bigger。

quiz.question: She is one of ______ employees in our company.
quiz.explanation: one of the + 最高級 + 複數名詞。

quiz.question: The presentation was not as ______ as we expected.
quiz.explanation: as...as 中間用原級形容詞。

units.title: 9. 情態助動詞 (Modal Verbs)
units.summary: can, may, must, should, will 的語氣差別

sections.heading: 常見情態助動詞
sections.body:
• can / could：能力、許可
  • may / might：可能性（might 更不確定）
  • must：必須、一定
  • should / ought to：應該（建議）
  • have to：必須（客觀規定）
  • will / would：意願、預測

情態動詞後面 一定接原形動詞，不能加 to。

sections.heading: 過去推測：must/might/could have + p.p.
sections.body:
• must have + p.p.（一定...過）
  • might have + p.p.（可能...過）
  • should have + p.p.（早該...）
examples: He must have forgotten the meeting.
I should have called earlier.

quiz.question: All employees ______ wear their ID badges at all times.
quiz.explanation: 表達規定必須 → must。

quiz.question: You ______ have informed me about the changes earlier.
quiz.explanation: should have + p.p. 表示「早該」，責備語氣。

quiz.question: The manager ______ be in the meeting room; I saw him go there.
quiz.explanation: 有根據的強烈推測 → must。

sections.heading: 時間介系詞
sections.body:
• at：具體時間點（at 3 p.m., at noon, at Christmas）
  • on：某日（on Monday, on July 4, on weekends）
  • in：月、年、世紀、較長時段（in 2025, in May, in the morning）
  • by：最晚到（by Friday = no later than Friday）
  • until / till：持續到（wait until 5 p.m.）
  • within：在...之內（within 30 days）

sections.heading: 地點介系詞
sections.body:
• at：具體一點（at the station, at home）
  • in：封閉空間（in the room, in Taipei）
  • on：表面（on the table, on the second floor）

sections.heading: 商務常用介系詞片語
sections.body:
• in charge of（負責）
  • in accordance with（依照）
  • on behalf of（代表）
  • due to（由於）
  • regardless of（不論）

quiz.question: Please submit your report ______ Friday.
quiz.explanation: 某一天用 on。

quiz.question: The package will arrive ______ 3 business days.
quiz.explanation: in + 一段時間，表示「在...之內」也可用 within。

quiz.question: The new policy takes effect ______ January 1.
quiz.explanation: 某一天 (January 1) 用 on。

quiz.question: I would like to speak ______ behalf of the entire team.
quiz.explanation: 固定片語 on behalf of（代表）。
